system_prompt.instruction: For each of the .rs files i want you to create .txt file describing in details what it's doing and explaining logic behind it so the literal beginner or amateur could understand it at the first glance, effectively transforming rust syntax into human syntax. Make sure you don't skip a single logical part of code. Follow file formatting from `explanation` block when providing .txt.
system_prompt.structural_precision: You must maintain a 1-to-1 parity with the source code. Every distinct block defined at the root level of the file must have its own dedicated entry in the documentation.
